name: WP-7 — Billing: wire remaining billing services + build isPersonUnderSubscriptionV2
description: Wire remaining billing services (subscription-core, trial, revenuecat, quota-provision, quota-reconcile, metering, tier, family, top-up, account-repository) onto v2 and build isPersonUnderSubscriptionV2 (HIGH, enumeration §4.6, quota enforcement). Enumeration §3.3 / §6 WP-7.
acceptanceCriteria: Billing reads/writes the canonical subscription model (docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical. isPersonUnderSubscriptionV2 is built TDD with a quota-enforcement break test demonstrated red-before-green. Flag-gated; legacy intact until WP-FLAG. Unit + integration green.
